title: “In 1952 we sent a signal to the cosmos…” - Eric Weinstein #uap #aliens
summary: Eric Weinstein discusses the significance of 1952 as a potential turning point when humanity signaled to the cosmos that we were close to possessing fundamental scientific knowledge, suggesting this could have been perceived as a threat by any observers.

events.description: Humanity allegedly sent a signal to the cosmos indicating we were close to possessing root level knowledge

key_claims.claim: In 1952 humanity sent a signal to the cosmos indicating we are very close to possessing root level knowledge
If something or someone was there to hear us, they probably interpreted our signal as meaning we're on the verge of being able to visit them
